name: extract_records
description: Extract structured records from HTML/text you already have in hand. Pass a JSON Schema describing ONE record; returns a list. Use this AFTER web_read/fetch_html — if you only have a URL, use web_extract instead.

text.description: HTML or text content (caller already fetched it).

schema.description: JSON Schema for ONE record; the tool returns an array of records matching it.

implementation_notes: Delegates to systemu.runtime.extractor.extract_records (Tier-3 LLM with 4-layer prompt-injection defense).
